lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's in this cave?

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: A unique farming patch. This cave is the only place we've succesfully been able to grow a Hespori.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a Hespori?

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: A rare carnivorous plant originally from Morytania. When grown, the plant becomes conscious and highly aggressive. They are truly fascinating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I grow one?

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Of course. Just plant some Hespori seeds in the cave below and it will grow like any other plant. A Hespori is pretty tough so you don't need to worry about it getting diseased.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Do be careful though. A fully grown Hespori can be quite troublesome to deal with.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Do you need anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any of my items?

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: I'm afraid not. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: I do indeed. You really should be more careful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want to find Hespori seeds when farming.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Very well. You'll no longer find Hespori seeds when farming.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Do you need anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to find Hespori seeds when farming.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Very well. You'll now have a chance of finding Hespori seeds when farming.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Do you need anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: I'm afraid I don't have anything for you. If I did have any of your items, but you died before collecting them, they'll now be lost.

sections.title: Attempting to fight the Hespori with items in Arno's Item Retrieval Service

lines.speaker: Arno
lines.text: Can you hear me down there? I have some of your items, from a previous visit. Shouldn't you collect them from me before fighting the Hespori again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll come and collect them from you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't care if I lose that stuff. I'll fight the Hespori again now.
